name: BulkPipe
tagline: Complete CRM. Contacts, deals, pipeline, email sequences, reporting, automations. All free, forever.
heroSvg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100"><defs><linearGradient id="bc-b1" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#4a9fff"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#2060cc"/></linearGradient><linearGradient id="bc-b2" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#ffd700"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#c8a200"/></linearGradient><linearGradient id="bc-b3" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#50cc70"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#2a9a48"/></linearGradient><linearGradient id="bc-b4" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#ff6b6b"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#cc3a3a"/></linearGradient><linearGradient id="bc-base" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#ddd"/><stop offset="50%" stop-color="#bbb"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#999"/></linearGradient></defs><rect x="10" y="82" width="80" height="6" rx="2" fill="url(#bc-base)" stroke="#888" stroke-width=".5"/><rect x="12" y="86" width="76" height="3" rx="1" fill="rgba(0,0,0,.15)"/><rect x="14" y="55" width="14" height="27" rx="1" fill="url(#bc-b1)"/><rect x="28" y="55" width="3" height="27" fill="#1850aa" opacity=".6"/><rect x="33" y="35" width="14" height="47" rx="1" fill="url(#bc-b2)"/><rect x="47" y="35" width="3" height="47" fill="#a08000" opacity=".6"/><rect x="52" y="22" width="14" height="60" rx="1" fill="url(#bc-b3)"/><rect x="66" y="22" width="3" height="60" fill="#1a7a30" opacity=".6"/><rect x="71" y="45" width="14" height="37" rx="1" fill="url(#bc-b4)"/><rect x="85" y="45" width="3" height="37" fill="#aa2828" opacity=".6"/><rect x="16" y="56" width="10" height="2" rx="1" fill="#fff" opacity=".3"/><rect x="35" y="36" width="10" height="2" rx="1" fill="#fff" opacity=".3"/><rect x="54" y="23" width="10" height="2" rx="1" fill="#fff" opacity=".3"/><rect x="73" y="46" width="10" height="2" rx="1" fill="#fff" opacity=".3"/></svg>

features.title: Contact Management
features.desc: Unlimited contacts with custom fields, tags, and activity timelines. Import from CSV, sync with email, and never lose a lead.

features.title: Deal Pipeline
features.desc: Visual kanban boards with drag-and-drop deals. Multiple pipelines, weighted forecasting, and customizable deal stages.

features.title: Email Sequences
features.desc: Automated multi-step email sequences with personalization. Track opens, clicks, and replies. A/B test subject lines.

features.title: Reporting Dashboard
features.desc: Revenue forecasts, activity metrics, pipeline velocity, and win/loss analysis. Real-time dashboards with custom widgets.

features.title: Task Management
features.desc: Assign tasks, set reminders, and track follow-ups. Automatic task creation from deal stage changes and email events.

features.title: Automations
features.desc: Workflow triggers for lead scoring, deal routing, email sending, and task creation. If-then logic with no code required.

useCases.title: Sales Teams
useCases.desc: Track every deal from first contact to close. Pipeline visibility for managers, task management for reps. No per-seat fees.

useCases.title: Small Businesses
useCases.desc: Stop losing leads in spreadsheets. Get enterprise CRM features without the enterprise price tag. Grow your business, not your software bill.

useCases.title: Startups
useCases.desc: Move fast with automated workflows. Score leads, route deals, and send follow-ups on autopilot. Focus on selling, not admin.
